events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, having been born in Liverpool on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! The man who kept the beat for the Fab Four, still rocking after all these years.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, born in Hampton Hill on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Rock God Birthday
angles.copy: Sending a huge birthday shout-out to the one and only Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and still delivering those iconic riffs at 79.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman Sir Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in Dartford, Kent on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, a true rock and roll icon.

events.title: MTV launched, first video was Buggles
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star? We think radio's doing just fine, thanks!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and loud as it did in '94. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival opened
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in time.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music lives on, forever influencing generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years since his passing. His impact on music and culture remains as powerful as ever.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Remembering a Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire and electrify.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring iconic tracks and that famous zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Walking Down Abbey Road
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today, born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer and the voice of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in Manchester on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad for it!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' significant 1975 re-release
events.blurb: While originally released in 1971, John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' saw a significant UK single re-release in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine's Enduring Message
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since 'Imagine' first dropped, and a key re-release in '75. John Lennon's message of peace still resonates today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: 25 Years of iPod
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. Remember your first one? It certainly changed how we carry our tunes.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Grab a martini, shaken not stirred, and celebrate over six decades of 007. What's your favourite Bond film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday today, born in Liverpool on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
